query: As of July 2026, what is the financial/bankruptcy status of Beyond Meat Inc? Has it filed for Chapter 11 or restructured debt? Any bankruptcy warnings, going concern doubts, debt restructuring, or imminent bankruptcy risk in 2025-2026?
answer:
I've completed the research on Beyond Meat's financial and bankruptcy status as of July 2026. 

**Key findings:** Beyond Meat has **NOT filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy**, but it **did restructure its debt** through a major distressed out-of-court debt-for-equity exchange in late 2025 that averted otherwise-likely bankruptcy tied to a ~$1.1B debt wall due 2027. Going-concern doubts were explicitly raised by analysts (TD Cowen) and credit agencies (Creditsafe) during 2025. The restructuring extended maturities to 2030 and eliminated over $800M of debt, but the company remains financially distressed — negative book equity (-$21.1M), sub-$1 stock (~$0.66, down 91% from its high), continued double-digit revenue declines, and analysts warning the restructuring may only be "delaying the inevitable." Full synthesis with sources and structured data points has been provided above.

sources.title: Beyond Meat headed to Chapter 11 bankruptcy
sources.snippet: 97% of bondholders agreed to swap 2027 debt for $202.5M debt maturing 2030 at 7% interest, issuing ~316M new shares; debt bill over $1.1B approaching in 2027.

sources.title: Analyst: Beyond Meat faces Chapter 11 bankruptcy as cash dwindles
sources.snippet: Creditsafe flagged Chapter 11 bankruptcy risk for Beyond Meat as cash dwindled.

sources.title: Beyond Meat Launches Exchange Offer and Consent Solicitation Intended to Eliminate Over $800 Million of Debt
sources.snippet: Exchange of 0% Convertible Notes due 2027 for up to $202.5M new 7.00% Convertible Senior Secured Second Lien PIK Toggle Notes due 2030 and up to 326,190,370 shares.

sources.title: Beyond Meat Q4 & Full Year 2025 8-K Press Release
sources.snippet: Q4 2025 net revenues $61.6M, down 19.7% YoY; net income of $370.9M inflated by ~$548.7M debt-restructuring gain.

sources.title: Beyond Meat Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
sources.snippet: Q1 2026 revenue $58.2M (-15.3% YoY), gross margin 3.4%, net loss -$28.5M, volumes down 19.5%.

sources.title: Beyond Meat Q1 2026 results: revenue down, loss narrows (BYND 8-K Filing)
sources.snippet: Cash use $11.8M (lowest in 2+ years), $205.8M cash on hand, total debt carrying value $411.6M, stockholders' deficit -$21.1M as of March 28, 2026.

sources.title: Beyond Meat's SWOT analysis: stock faces dilution amid restructuring
Beyond Meat Shares Fall 78% After Finalizing Debt Exchange
sources.snippet: Convertible notes exchange reduced total debt from $1.15B to approximately $250M.

key_facts: No Chapter 11 bankruptcy filing has occurred as of July 2026.
Beyond Meat completed a major distressed out-of-court debt restructuring (debt-for-equity exchange) in late 2025, extending maturities from 2027 to 2030.

The exchange swapped 0% Convertible Notes due 2027 for up to $202.5M of new 7.00% Convertible Senior Secured Second Lien PIK Toggle Notes due 2030 plus up to 326.19M common shares; ~97% of bondholders participated.
The restructuring eliminated over $800M of debt, cutting total debt from ~$1.15B to roughly $250M initially.
Going-concern risk was explicitly flagged by TD Cowen; Creditsafe/analysts flagged Chapter 11 bankruptcy risk in 2025.
Stockholders' deficit (negative book equity) of -$21.1M as of March 28, 2026 indicates balance-sheet insolvency.
Stock traded ~$0.66 in July 2026, down ~91% from 52-week high of $7.69 and below the $1 delisting threshold.
Q1 2026 revenue $58.2M (-15.3% YoY), net loss -$28.5M; volumes down ~19.5%.
Cash on hand $205.8M vs total debt carrying value $411.6M as of Q1 2026; cash burn improving to $11.8M (lowest in 2+ years).
Share count ballooned from ~76M (mid-2025) to ~455M diluted (Q1 2026) due to dilution from the restructuring.
Q4 2025 reported net income of +$370.9M was driven by a one-time debt-restructuring accounting gain (~$523-549M), masking a ~$130M operating loss.
Company is exiting China and consolidating production to reduce costs.

data_points.metric: Q4 2025 reported net income (incl. one-time restructuring gain)
